entries.summary: Serving quality depends on latency, memory, batching, and hardware efficiency more than on model architecture alone.

entries.summary: Math connects model behavior to geometry, curvature, and optimization.

entries.summary: Metrics only matter when they match the question you actually care about.

entries.summary: Reinforcement learning is about choosing actions that improve long-run reward, not just immediate reward.

entries.summary: Representation learning asks how to turn raw input into geometry that makes downstream tasks easier.
